summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive refs were found, no merge/fix actions are allowed by this job, and the only closed PR is kept closed.

actions.reason: Distinct active ACP bug-fix PR with contributor work and review/proof state to preserve; not a duplicate, low-signal close, or superseded candidate in this shard.
Large maintainer-owned Telegram fix with active review context and risk labels; it should stay on the normal maintainer path, not be closed or merged by inventory cleanup.
Focused active agents PR with supplied proof and maintainer-review status; it is independent of the other inventory items and not eligible for cleanup closure.
Already closed by the contributor as redundant; no mutation is valid or needed.
Small active onboarding feature PR with passing checks but no maintainer review in the hydrated artifact; keep it on the normal review path.
